transcript: Speaker A: English समझ आती है, पढ़ना भी आता है, लेकिन कभी सोचा है कि बोलना क्यों नहीं आता? एक रिपोर्ट के अनुसार, भारत में लगभग 10% लोगों को इंग्लिश पढ़नी आती है, लेकिन उनमें से सिर्फ 1-2% लोग ही इंग्लिश बोल पाते हैं। इसकी सबसे बड़ी वजह है कि प्रैक्टिस करने के लिए बात करने वाला कोई नहीं होता। इसी समस्या को हल करने के लिए IIT पास आउट छात्रों ने MySivi ऐप बनाया है। इसमें मौजूद Human Co-learners फीचर आपका कॉन्फिडेंस बढ़ाता है और आपको आसानी से इंग्लिश बोलने में मदद करता है। यह कोई ऐसा ऐप नहीं है जिसके लिए आपको 2000-3000 रुपये खर्च करने पड़ें। MySivi में आप सिर्फ ₹1 में अपना ट्रायल शुरू कर सकते हैं। तो अगर आप भी इंग्लिश बोलने की प्रैक्टिस करना चाहते हैं, तो अभी MySivi डाउनलोड करें। ऑफर मिस मत कीजिए। [Speaker A: You understand English, you can read it too, but have you ever thought why you can't speak it? According to a report, about 10% of people in India can read English, but only 1-2% of them can speak it. The biggest reason for this is that there is no one to talk to for practice. To solve this problem, IIT pass-out students have created the MySivi app. Its Human Co-learners feature boosts your confidence and helps you speak English easily. This is not an app for which you have to spend 2000-3000 rupees. In MySivi, you can start your trial for just ₹1. So if you also want to practice speaking English, download MySivi now. Don't miss the offer.]
on_screen_text:
ENGLISH
MySivi
LEKIN KABHI SOCHA HAI KI BOLNA KYU NAHI AATA? [But have you ever thought why you can't speak?]
EK REPORT KE ANSAR [According to a report]
BHARAT ME LAGBHAG 10% LOGON KO ENGLISH [About 10% people in India English]
LEKIN UNME SE SIRF 1-2% LOG HI [But only 1-2% of them]
ISKI SABSE BADI WAJAH HAI KI [The biggest reason for this is]
PRACTICE KARNE KE LIYE [To practice]
IIT PASS OUT CHHATRON NE [IIT pass out students]
MySivi APP BANAYA HAI [Have made MySivi app]
HUMAN CO-LEARNERS FEATURE
AAPKA CONFIDENCE BADHATA HAI [Boosts your confidence]
AAPKO AASANI SE ENGLISH BOLNE ME [To speak English easily]
YE KOI AISA APP NAHI HAI [This is not such an app]
2000-3000 RUPEYE [2000-3000 rupees]
MySivi ME AAP SIRF ₹1 ME APNA [In MySivi you only for ₹1 your]
TRIAL SHURU KAR SAKTE HAIN [Can start trial]
TO AGAR AAP BHI [So if you also]
ENGLISH BOLNE KI PRACTICE [English speaking practice]
TO ABHI MySivi DOWNLOAD KAREN [Then download MySivi now]
OFFER MISS MAT KIJIYE [Don't miss the offer]
summary: The ad addresses the common struggle of understanding English but being unable to speak it fluently due to lack of practice. It introduces MySivi, an app developed by IIT graduates featuring 'Human Co-learners' to build speaking confidence. Viewers are urged to download the app and start a trial for just ₹1.
